Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify cases that contain the exact sequence Approve Purchase Requisition Create Order Confirm Order with no intervening events and where the time between Create Order and Confirm Order is more than 5 days

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The CTE sequence cases finds all case id values that have the exact three activity sequence in order have no other events between them ensuring direct succession and have a time difference of more than 5 days between Create Order and Confirm Order

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Ensure direct succession no other activity in between using not exists checks based only on timestamps between e1 and e2 and between e2 and e3

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Return all events from event log except those belonging to the identified cases using where case id not in select case id from sequence cases

Name: Validation - NE
Text: This ensures your result contains only events from cases that either do not contain the full sequence contain the sequence but with 5 days between Create Order and Confirm Order or have the sequence but with other events in between breaking direct succession
